task.title: MongoDB Integration with Drizzle ORM
task.description: Connect to MongoDB using Drizzle ORM for integration configs and templates

implementation.details:
1. Add Drizzle ORM with MongoDB adapter
2. Define schemas for integrations and templates
3. Configure database connection with Effect
4. Implement CRUD operations as Effect services
5. Add database health checks

task.acceptance_criteria: MongoDB connections successful, can create/read/update/delete integration records via Drizzle
